_note: Amazon affiliate product catalog. Each entry is referenced by [AFFILIATE:key] placeholders in WP drafts. Keys are lowercase, hyphenated. ASIN is the 10-char Amazon product id from the URL (amazon.com/dp/ASIN). Display is a human-readable fallback name.
